ddls:
CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "mission_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the mission */,
  "mission_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the mission */,
  "mission_status" TEXT /* Current status of the mission (e.g., active, completed, aborted) */,
  "mission_type" TEXT /* Type of the mission (e.g., cargo, passenger, test flight) */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft assigned to the mission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the mission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mission was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the mission record */,
  "total_passengers" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers on the mission */,
  "total_cargo_weight" REAL /* Total weight of cargo on the mission in tons */,
  "estimated_distance" REAL /* Estimated distance of the mission in miles */,
  "estimated_flight_time" REAL /* Estimated flight time of the mission in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_mission_type FOREIGN KEY ("mission_type") REFERENCES mission_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "tail_number" TEXT /* Tail number of the aircraft */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the aircraft was manufactured */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the aircraft (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "total_flight_hours" REAL /* Total flight hours of the aircraft */,
  "max_altitude" REAL /* Maximum altitude of the aircraft in feet */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed of the aircraft in knots */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_model FOREIGN KEY ("model") REFERENCES aircraft_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES aircraft_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., pilot, maintenance crew, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* Employee ID of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mission_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission the log entry belongs to */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., takeoff, landing, refueling) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event occurred */,
  "logged_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mission_logs_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mission_logs_logged_by FOREIGN KEY ("logged_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew assignment */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission the assignment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the mission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the mission (e.g., pilot, co-pilot, flight attendant) */,
  "assignment_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the crew assignment */,
  "assignment_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the crew assignment */,
  "crew_position" TEXT /* Position of the crew member in the crew */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_assignments_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft the maintenance record belongs to */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "completed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who completed the maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "maintenance_hours" REAL /* Number of hours spent on maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_completed_by FOREIGN KEY ("completed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES aircraft_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_maintenance_type FOREIGN KEY ("maintenance_type") REFERENCES maintenance_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight plan */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission the flight plan belongs to */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin airport of the flight */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination airport of the flight */,
  "estimated_departure_time" TEXT /* Estimated departure time */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route of the flight */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the flight in feet */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the flight in knots */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_plans_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel log entry */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission the log entry belongs to */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel activity (e.g., refueling, consumption) */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of fuel involved */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., gallons, liters) */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  "logged_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged the activity */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_logs_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_logs_logged_by FOREIGN KEY ("logged_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather log entry */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission the log entry belongs to */,
  "weather_type" TEXT /* Type of weather (e.g., clear, rainy, foggy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather conditions */,
  "observation_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the observation was made */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of observation in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the time of observation as a percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of observation in knots */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_logs_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety incident */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission the incident occurred during */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of the incident (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "incident_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the incident occurred */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the incident */,
  "injury_level" TEXT /* Level of injury caused by the incident (e.g., none, minor, major) */,
  "damage_level" TEXT /* Level of damage caused by the incident (e.g., none, minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_incidents_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_incidents_incident_type FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type") REFERENCES incident_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_incidents_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mission_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mission type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft model */,
  "year_of_introduction" INTEGER /* Year the model was introduced */,
  "max_passenger_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum passenger capacity of the model */,
  "max_cargo_capacity" REAL /* Maximum cargo capacity of the model in tons */,
  "range" REAL /* Range of the model in miles */,
  "ceiling" REAL /* Service ceiling of the model in feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the aircraft status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the maintenance type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mission_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mission_versions_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission the log entry belongs to */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)
